transcript.speaker: John D. Smith
transcript.text: Dr. Longo, when did you first examine the sample?

followed_by.speaker: William E. Longo
followed_by.text: I first examined the sample on March 12th, 2023.

transcript.speaker: Karen Liu
transcript.text: Did you perform a differential thermal analysis?

ruling.speaker: Judge Mary Blake
ruling.notes: The witness has already established sufficient expertise.

followed_by.speaker: William E. Longo
followed_by.text: Yes, I did perform a differential thermal analysis as part of the protocol.

transcript.speaker: John D. Smith
transcript.text: What method did you use to quantify asbestos fibers?

followed_by.speaker: William E. Longo
followed_by.text: We used a combination of TEM and PLM to quantify asbestos fibers.

notes: Deposition lasted approximately 3.5 hours, with a 15-minute break at 10:30 AM.
